title: MailerLite vs Campaign Monitor (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare MailerLite and Campaign Monitor. See pricing, features, and ratings to find the best email marketing tool for your needs.
h1: MailerLite vs Campaign Monitor: Detailed Comparison
intro: MailerLite and Campaign Monitor are both established email marketing platforms, but they cater to different business types and budgets. MailerLite focuses on affordability and simplicity for small businesses and freelancers, while Campaign Monitor targets agencies and teams managing multiple brands. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your email marketing needs.

comparison_table.tool_b: Agencies and teams with multiple brands

comparison_table.tool_a: Drag-drop editor, automation, landing pages, pop-ups, surveys, e-commerce integrations
comparison_table.tool_b: Template builder, journey designer, smart segments, multi-brand management, analytics, transactional email

choose_a_if: You're a small business or freelancer looking for an affordable, easy-to-use email marketing solution
You want to test email marketing without upfront costs using the free tier
You need landing pages, pop-ups, and e-commerce integrations bundled into one platform
You prefer a drag-and-drop editor that doesn't require technical expertise
choose_b_if: You manage multiple brands or client accounts and need multi-brand management features
You require advanced automation through journey designer and smart segmentation
You need transactional email capabilities for order confirmations and notifications
You're part of an agency or larger team requiring enterprise-level features

faq.q: Is MailerLite better than Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. MailerLite is superior for small businesses and budget-conscious users thanks to its freemium model and lower pricing, plus it has higher user satisfaction ratings (4.6 vs 4.1 on G2). Campaign Monitor is better if you need advanced multi-brand management and team collaboration features for agencies.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: MailerLite is significantly cheaper overall. It offers a free tier for up to 1,000 subscribers with full access to most features, while Campaign Monitor has no free option and starts at $11/month. MailerLite's paid plans begin at $9/month, making it more budget-friendly for growing businesses.

faq.q: Can I switch from Campaign Monitor to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, switching is typically straightforward. Both platforms support standard email list exports and imports. MailerLite's customer support can assist with migration, and most of your email automation workflows and segments can be recreated in MailerLite's interface. Always back up your data before making the switch.
